summary: Completed testing of PVP sync fixes, timer constants, tap rate notification removal, mint limit display, and BL Coins Upgrade feature. All key features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Backend returns max_taps_per_second=25 while frontend uses 30 TPS - minor inconsistency

action_items: Consider updating backend MAX_TAPS_PER_SECOND from 25 to 30 to match frontend (optional - low priority)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PVP sync fixes verified. Timer constants (10s photo, 5s RPS) confirmed in code. Auto-select logic implemented. Tap rate notification removed. Mint limit shows X/10. Upgrade button and modal working in Card View.

pvp_finish_round_idempotency.details: Backend /pvp/finish-round endpoint has idempotent check - returns cached result if round already finished (lines 1970-1983 in game_routes.py)

photo_selection_timer_10s.details: PHOTO_SELECTION_TIME = 10 constant defined at line 28 in PVPBattleArena.jsx

rps_selection_timer_5s.details: RPS_SELECTION_TIME = 5 constant defined at line 29 in PVPBattleArena.jsx

auto_select_highest_value.details: Auto-select logic at lines 731-743 sorts photos by dollar_value descending and selects best photo when timer expires

tap_rate_notification_hidden.details: No toast notifications in TappingArena.jsx - tap rate exceeded toast completely removed

mint_limit_shows_10.details: UI shows 0/10 for daily mints. Backend returns daily_limit=10 for free users

upgrade_button_on_cards.details: Upgrade button appears on photo card back in Card View mode (data-testid='upgrade-dollar-value-btn')

upgrade_modal_opens.details: UpgradeModal component implemented at line 1031 in MintedPhotos.jsx, opens when clicking Upgrade button
